div.class: tw-min-h-screen tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-justify-start tw-bg-white tw-font-['Inter'] tw-pt-[48px] tw-pb-[48px]
tw-w-[448px] tw-max-w-[95vw] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-[#e5e5e5] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-shadow-[0px_1px_2px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] tw-p-[32px]
tw-w-[64px] tw-h-[64px] tw-bg-[#f5f5f5] tw-rounded-full tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center

h2.class: tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[24px] tw-leading-[32px] tw-text-[#171717] tw-text-center tw-mb-[8px]

p.class: tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[14px] tw-leading-[20px] tw-text-[#525252] tw-text-center tw-mb-[24px]

t.t-esc: otp_email_message or 'Kami telah mengirimkan kode verifikasi 6 digit ke email Anda'

p.class: tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[14px] tw-leading-[20px] tw-text-[#525252] tw-text-center tw-mb-[16px]

div.class: tw-bg-[#fffbeb] tw-border tw-border-[#f59e0b] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-p-[16px] tw-mb-[16px]

p.class: tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-semibold tw-text-[13px] tw-text-[#92400e] tw-mb-[8px] tw-m-0
tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[13px] tw-text-[#92400e] tw-mb-[8px] tw-m-0

div.p: Untuk mengirim SMS secara otomatis, diperlukan integrasi API SMS (Twilio/Fonnte).

div.class: tw-bg-[#f0f9ff] tw-border tw-border-[#0ea5e9] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-p-[16px] tw-mb-[24px]

p.class: tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[13px] tw-text-[#0c4a6e] tw-mb-[10px] tw-m-0

input.class: tw-flex-1 tw-h-[38px] tw-border tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[6px] tw-px-[12px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-text-[14px] tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#0ea5e9]

button.class: tw-h-[38px] tw-px-[16px] tw-bg-[#0ea5e9] tw-text-white tw-rounded-[6px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-text-[13px] tw-border-none tw-cursor-pointer hover:tw-bg-[#0284c7] tw-transition-colors tw-whitespace-nowrap

label.class: tw-block tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[14px] tw-text-[#404040] tw-mb-[12px]

input.name: digit1
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

input.name: digit2
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

input.name: digit3
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

input.name: digit4
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

input.name: digit5
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

input.name: digit6
input.class: tw-w-[48px] tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-white tw-border tw-border-solid tw-border-[#d4d4d4] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-center tw-text-[20px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[#171717] tw-outline-none focus:tw-border-[#171717] tw-transition-colors

button.class: tw-w-full tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-[#171717] tw-rounded-[8px] tw-text-white tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[16px] tw-text-center tw-cursor-pointer tw-border-none hover:tw-bg-[#2d2d2d] tw-transition-colors
tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[14px] tw-text-[#171717] tw-bg-transparent tw-border-none tw-cursor-pointer tw-underline hover:tw-text-[#525252] tw-transition-colors tw-p-0

a.class: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-[8px] tw-font-['Inter'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[14px] tw-text-[#525252] tw-no-underline hover:tw-text-[#171717] tw-transition-colors
